title: Dramatic election may mean good things for DNC TV ratings
shortDescription: After a surprising election turnabout with Kamala Harris taking the reins from Joe Biden, the DNC could see higher Nielsen ratings this year.

title: Trump's immigration agenda: End natural-born citizenship
shortDescription: One of Republicans biggest talking points in the 2024 election is immigration. Donald Trump has proposed several policy ideas. Here is what to know.

title: From Delaware to DC: The key moments on Joe Biden's political life
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is expected to make his political swan song at the DNC Monday night. Here's what you need to know about his career.

title: As Democrats kick off convention, House GOP drop Biden impeachment report
shortDescription: House Republicans released its Biden impeachment report as the Democratic convention begins. It accuses Biden of 'egregious' corruption, which he denies.

title: DNC brings out the stars in hopes of winning votes
shortDescription: DNC hopes John Legend, Octavia Spencer and Prince Royce will outshine RNC's Kid Rock, Hulk Hogan and Lee Greenwood.

title: Why some Democrats are skipping the DNC in Chicago
shortDescription: Sens. Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown and Jacky Rosen are among the Democrats in tough 2024 races who are staying away from the Windy City and the DNC.

title: No longer running, how Biden, a supple political master, met his hard stop
shortDescription: Joe Biden changed the course of the presidential race when he ended his bid for another term. His decision may change the course of history.

title: GOP impeachment report accuses Biden of corruption
shortDescription: GOP impeachment report accuses Biden of corruption

title: When is first Trump-Harris presidential debate? Here's what we know
shortDescription: The second presidential debate of the 2024 election, but the first between Donald Trump and Kamala Harris, is scheduled in September in Philadelphia.

title: Lindsey Graham says 'Donald Trump the provocateur' could lose election
shortDescription: In an interview on "Meet The Press," Lindsey Graham echoed other Republicans' desire for Trump to focus on policy

title: Stars over scripture. Voters are finding 'hope' in astrology
shortDescription: A growing number of millennials and Gen Z voters have found faith in astrology, and some are turning to it in the 2024 election.

title: 'It's tight': Some Trump voters deny Harris' progress, but others are worried
shortDescription: Trump is holding rallies across America this week to blunt Harris' momentum. The mood at a Pennsylvania rally Saturday was a mix of confidence and concern.

title: He got the convention. Can Pritzker send blue-collar voters to Harris?
shortDescription: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker got Biden to give him the Democratic convention. He's using it to showcase his record and move voters beyond weeks of chaos.

title: Trump pushes 20 core campaign promises as platform scales down
shortDescription: Donald Trump has touted his 20 core campaign promises, the third version of his policy platform. Here is how his campaign promises have changed.

title: Project 2025 wants PA election chief in handcuffs over 2020
shortDescription: The conservative blueprint, closely linked to Donald Trump, says Pennsylvania's former election chief should be prosecuted over 2020 ballot guidance.

title: Black voters prefer Harris over Trump but it's still a contest
shortDescription: USA TODAY/Suffolk poll shows Black voters now more enthusiastic to vote Democratic, but race isn't over
